claims.claim: Alessandro Costa has a low center of gravity and is a physical grappler.
claims.quote: Costa's got that low center of gravity. He's a physical grappler

claims.claim: Cody Durden will be at a striking deficit against Alessandro Costa.
claims.quote: I think Cody Duran going to be in a bit of a striking deficit

claims.claim: Cutting back down to flyweight may not serve Cody Durden well compared to his performance at bantamweight.
claims.quote: I'm not sure cutting back down to flyweight is going to serve him well.

claims.claim: Cody Durden has a history of being finished by strikes or submissions.
claims.quote: Yes, he was dropped and then subbed by Nasimento. Yes, José OA shotguned him and put him away... Bruno Silva caught him with a big shot, knocked him out.

claims.claim: Alessandro Costa is a tier better than Dumont in grappling positions.
claims.quote: I think Costa is a tier better than that and I think we're looking at a nice alleandro Costa win

claims.claim: Alessandro Costa is super aggressive in his fighting style.
claims.quote: Costa is super aggressive

claims.claim: Cody Duran has a tendency to shoot for takedowns when pressured.
claims.quote: you're going to see Cody Duran shoot on him a couple times.

claims.claim: Ryan Gandra leaves his head up and does not keep his hands up while moving forward and throwing punches.
claims.quote: This dude ba ba ba head up in the air moving forward. I feel like somebody's going to catch him.

claims.claim: Zachary Reese has good jiu-jitsu skills.
claims.quote: Zack Reese is low-key a pretty good jiu-jitsu player.

claims.claim: Ryan Gandra possesses significantly more knockout power than Zachary Reese.
claims.quote: The power is a no contest. It's clearly Ryan Gandra.

claims.claim: Zachary Reese struggles to defend against clinch work.
claims.quote: Jackson McVey in the clinch was [__] Reese up. I could see Gandra in close range [__] him up

claims.claim: Farid Basharat is a high-caliber mixed martial artist with a crafty and well-rounded game.
claims.quote: The guy has proven time and time and again that he's a high caliber mixed martial artist with a crafty and well-rounded game.

claims.claim: John Garza has promising striking attributes, including a good right hand and effective body attacks.
claims.quote: He has some promising attributes with his striking. He's got a good right hand. He's pressure focused, even attacks the body.

claims.claim: John Garza gassed out in a fight that went long against Nick Gajali in 2024.
claims.quote: he gassed out in 2024. I saw him in a fight that went long. And I saw him really slow down. The opponent was Nick Gajali.

claims.claim: John Garza is at a significant disadvantage due to taking this fight on short notice against a seasoned UFC veteran.
claims.quote: stepping in on short notice against an actual UFC vet at this point, Farad Basharat, I feel like this is like lock of the card, bro.

claims.claim: Damian Pinas possesses one-touch knockout power similar to Deontay Wilder.
claims.quote: He reminds me of like a [ __ ] Deontay Wilder of MMA a little bit. Like I really think he has that just one touch stud.

claims.claim: Caesar Almeida is 38 years old and at a reach disadvantage against Damian Pinas.
claims.quote: he's 38. He's fighting a 24 year old. He's at a reach disadvantage.

claims.claim: Caesar Almeida has a more technical and layered striking game than Damian Pinas.
claims.quote: I'm going to take the guy who I I think has more layers to his striking.

claims.claim: Damian Pinas has an athletic and speed advantage due to his youth.
claims.quote: I could see the athletics advantage on his side and he's young.

claims.claim: Penas is a better finisher than Caesar Almeida.
claims.quote: he's a better finisher than Caesar Almeida

claims.claim: Tracy Cortez has fought higher-level competition than Kong Wang.
claims.quote: hasn't really fought the competition that Tracy Cortez has fought

claims.claim: Kong Wang is a faster striker than Tracy Cortez.
claims.quote: I think Wang's faster.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka is durable and has not been knocked out since 2020.
claims.quote: he hasn't been knocked out since 2020 against Jonathan Pierce

claims.claim: Luke Riley is technically sharper and faster than Kai Kamaka.
claims.quote: I think Luke Riley's a little faster than him, a little technically sharper.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka lacks finishing power in his strikes.
claims.quote: he has no consequence. There's no consequence to getting hit by Kai Kamaka.

claims.claim: Luke Riley has the ability to recover and finish strong even when losing rounds.
claims.quote: Luke Riley could dig deep. He starts losing around, he'll come back and finish strong at the end.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka is durable and has not been knocked out since 2020.
claims.quote: The guy's never been uh knocked out since what I mean he's been knocked out, but he hasn't been knocked out since 2020

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka uses footwork and head movement to avoid liver shots.
claims.quote: He's going to be moving his feet, moving his head off the center line, keeping his elbows tight so you can't hit that liver.

claims.claim: Cody Garbrandt is not as active as he used to be, with his last real win occurring in 2023.
claims.quote: Garbrandt not very active. Last real win was 2023.

claims.claim: Adrien Yanz has a speed advantage over Cody Garbrandt.
claims.quote: I feel like Adrien Giannis has that speed advantage, dude.

claims.claim: Adrien Yanz uses high guard pressure to force opponents to the fence and land combinations.
claims.quote: Giannis picks the hands up high, puts the pressure on you, keeps cooking you, keeps cooking you, and finds a way um to land big combinations.

claims.claim: Gable Stevenson is a high-caliber wrestler who will likely take the fight to the ground to utilize ground and pound.
claims.quote: I think Gable is uh going to probably get this fight to the mat and deliver some ground and pound.

claims.claim: Alicia Ellison has a confidence issue that was evident in his performance against Paris.
claims.quote: The thing that um the the the training partner told me was there's a confidence problem here with Ellison and I think you could see it against Paris the way he kind of folded.

claims.claim: Gable Stevenson is a top 10 talent at heavyweight.
claims.quote: I definitely think with who's around him in the game, he's a top 10 type talent

claims.claim: Robert Whitaker will be faster than Nikita Krillov in their matchup.
claims.quote: I think Whitaker is gonna have a good performance here. I think he's going to be a lot faster than Nikita Krillov.

claims.claim: Nikita Krillov's chin is compromised.
claims.quote: I mean, I felt like the chin was gone. We saw it against Rey as a one-shot slime out. We saw it against Gushkov, a first round KO.

claims.claim: Robert Whitaker's striking is superior to Nikita Krillov's.
claims.quote: I feel like Whitaker's striking is a nice edge here.

claims.claim: Robert Whitaker will be able to defend Nikita Krillov's wrestling.
claims.quote: Shouldn't have much of an issue with the Krill offensive wrestling.

claims.claim: Robert Whittaker is the smallest light heavyweight in the UFC.
claims.quote: He might be the smallest light heavyweight in the UFC.

claims.claim: Nikita Krylov is a bigger, stronger fighter than Robert Whittaker.
claims.quote: He's a big strong dude and a capable striker.

claims.claim: Robert Whittaker has a significant speed advantage over Nikita Krylov.
claims.quote: I think the speed advantage is gonna be crazy here versus Nikita Klov.

claims.claim: Robert Whittaker's technical skill level is superior to Nikita Krylov's.
claims.quote: Rob Whitaker's technique level is is a league or two above Nikita Klov.

claims.claim: Nikita Krylov lacks the grappling ability to utilize his size advantage against Robert Whittaker.
claims.quote: I don't see a grappling advantage for Klov here... I don't see uh Nikita being able to do so

claims.claim: Bobby Green's habit of fighting with his hands down makes him vulnerable to being caught by Terrence McKinney.
claims.quote: King Green's game is built upon keeping those [ __ ] hands down at all times. And to do that against Terrence McKini scares me, bro.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney is a fast starter who relies on a high-pressure, bullying style.
claims.quote: Terrence McKini is the fastest starter in the game. And it's all gas, no breaks.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney lacks resilience when he faces significant resistance.
claims.quote: There's not resilience when there's force put on the opposite end.

claims.claim: Bobby Green's durability is questionable at this stage of his career.
claims.quote: I don't have confidence in his durability in 2026 with this type of animal.

claims.claim: The large cage size benefits Bobby Green's movement-based style.
claims.quote: They're in that big cage. I think that helps Bobby Green do his thing a little bit, too.

claims.claim: Bobby Green's lateral movement is key to his survival against Terrence McKinney.
claims.quote: I think Bobby Green needs to be mobile here, AJ. If he's mobile, if he's moving laterally, I think he survives.

claims.claim: The large cage size benefits Bobby Green by allowing him to avoid Terrence McKinney's early pressure.
claims.quote: using the big cage again. If they were in the small cage, I think that helps Terence McKini put that storm on you in the big cage.

claims.claim: Bobby Green's habit of fighting with his hands down is a significant defensive liability.
claims.quote: I get terrified about the hands down style, too, bro. I don't know if I've ever bet on Bobby Green in my life, you know? I just I hate the hands down thing

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney is susceptible to being finished early if he fails to secure a quick victory.
claims.quote: of course, you're rolling the dice with Terence McKini early on, but, you know, survive that initial storm, he'll start getting his hands going.

claims.claim: Lonard Kavanaugh has a significant advantage in technical striking over Brandon Royval.
claims.quote: I think we're looking at Loner Kavanaaugh with a real advantage in technical striking.

claims.claim: Brandon Royval's recent knockout loss to Manel Kape indicates a durability concern.
claims.quote: the next fight I mean Minnell Cop starched him in the first round.

claims.claim: Lonard Kavanaugh's cardio is proven for five-round fights, even at high altitude.
claims.quote: And he just went five rounds. So now I'm not sitting here questioning the cardio. If he's going five on short notice in Mexico City

claims.claim: Corey Sandhagen possesses a superior jiu-jitsu game compared to Mario Bautista.
claims.quote: Corey Sanhagen is so goddamn good at fighting. His jiu-jitsu is still better than Mario Batista

claims.claim: Mario Bautista has shown significant improvement in his striking volume and cardio since his first fight with Corey Sandhagen.
claims.quote: I don't think this is the same dude they fought uh that that Cory Sanhagen beat in 2019... you're dealing with the 2026 version of Mario Batista.

claims.claim: Cory Sandhagen has a superior jiu-jitsu game compared to Mario Bautista.
claims.quote: His jiu-jitsu is still better than Mario Batista even though he's over there at the MMA lab with a lot of good grapplers.

claims.claim: Mario Bautista has improved his volume and cardio since his 2019 loss to Cory Sandhagen.
claims.quote: I think Mario Batista over these last couple has shown improvements. I don't think this is the same dude they fought uh that that Cory Sanhagen beat in 2019.

claims.claim: Mario Bautista is physically stronger and more muscular than Cory Sandhagen.
claims.quote: he was hated after his cage work against Jose Aldo, but he's a physical dude. He's pretty [ __ ] jacked for this weight class, whereas, you know, we got more of the Slenderman man build for Cory Sanhagen.

claims.claim: Cory Sandhagen has a significant advantage in footwork and speed at distance.
claims.quote: I think he's a little quicker from distance. The footwork is an edge.

claims.claim: Cory Sandhagen has a higher level of strength of schedule and proven experience against top-tier competition than Mario Bautista.
claims.quote: I like the competition he's fought better. you know, Corey Sanhagen's fighting, you know, Morab and um I feel like at this, you know, in in in the big cage, I I think he's going to be able to get two out of three rounds against Mario Batista.

claims.claim: Mario Bautista lacks a clear wrestling advantage over Cory Sandhagen.
claims.quote: You know, Mario doesn't have a clear wrestling advantage here. I think that matters.

claims.claim: Cory Sandhagen is difficult to hit and possesses strong defensive striking.
claims.quote: Cory Sanhagen not easy to hit, right? Not defensively bankrupt. This dude's pretty hard to get to.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis relies on forward pressure and heavy kicks but his striking is sloppy and counterable.
claims.quote: It's forward pressure. It's heavy kicks to the body and head. It's blitzing strikes in range, but it's sloppy. It's counterable.

claims.claim: Paddy Pimblett's jiu-jitsu is vastly superior to Benoit Saint-Denis's grappling.
claims.quote: I know that the Patty Pimble's jiu-jitsu is vastly superior.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis is prone to making technical mistakes and overreacting when moving forward.
claims.quote: He does kind of lock up and overreact a little bit.

claims.claim: Paddy Pimblett is dangerous in any position on the ground, including guard, mount, and back control.
claims.quote: Patty's got a good guard. Patty will triangle you. Patty will triangle arm bar you... Patty Pimble is dangerous in any position

claims.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has a striking edge over Paddy Pimblett.
claims.quote: I will give a striking edge to Benois Saint as we talked about earlier.

claims.claim: Paddy Pimblett has shown significant improvement in his physical conditioning and mental maturity.
claims.quote: He went from being kind of a boy to being like super jacked and, you know, he's he's become a man in front of our eyes.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor has a significant power advantage over Max Holloway.
claims.quote: Connor's got the power advantage.

claims.claim: Max Holloway possesses superior cardio compared to Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: He's got that long cardio. He's got the ability to fight for five rounds.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor struggles with cardio and fatigue in later rounds.
claims.quote: It's just something we saw Nate Diaz expose in Conor McGregor's game.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is highly elusive and difficult to hit due to his footwork.
claims.quote: Max Holloway is super hard to hit.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor has become too flat-footed in his recent performances.
claims.quote: Connor against Porier got exposed for being too flatfooted.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff from the sport.
claims.quote: AJ, five years out the game.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's performance declines when he faces resistance and gets hit.
claims.quote: when there is resistance set forth and he starts getting touched... this wilt starts to play in.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is an elite-level offensive technician and combination puncher.
claims.quote: Max Holloway is a [ __ ] elite caliber offensive technician, too. Max Holloway is a combination puncher.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will experience fatigue during the fight.
claims.quote: I think McGregor is going to fatigue.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will be less mobile at 170 pounds compared to his previous weight classes.
claims.quote: Is going to be more mobile or less mobile. I'm going to say less mobile.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is slower now than when he was at his peak.
claims.quote: Is he going to have better cardio or worse cardio? Is he going to be faster or slower maybe is the better way to say it. I think probably slower.

claims.claim: Max Holloway's speed is significantly higher than Conor McGregor's current speed.
claims.quote: I think Max's speed is going to be double Conor McGregor's speed.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is currently training with 'yes-men' rather than elite fighters.
claims.quote: it seems like he's got some yesmen around him. It seems like he's not training with the best fighters in the world.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
claims.quote: Five years out the game, coming back at 170

claims.claim: Max Holloway is currently in-season and fighting at a high level of activity.
claims.quote: you're talking about a guy who's fought the who's who consistently coming off of championship fights, BMF title wins.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is showing physical signs of aging due to his high level of activity and wars in the cage.
claims.quote: I see Max aging a little bit, too. aging with activity, like aging against the top level of the game.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is surrounded by 'yes men' and is not training with the best fighters in the world.
claims.quote: it seems like he's got some yesmen around him. It seems like he's not training with the best fighters in the world.

claims.claim: Max Holloway does not train at an elite-level gym.
claims.quote: Max Holloway has never been known for having an elite team, right? So, um it's not like um uh like it's it's not it's not like Max is at AKA or some [ __ ] at American Top Team

claims.claim: Max Holloway is currently in a good performance stride.
claims.quote: He's just catching Max Holloway in a nice stride here.

claims.claim: Adrian Yanez is at a higher skill level than Cody Garbrandt.
claims.quote: I will go with Adrian Giannis to show levels to Cody Nol love.
